meta.summary: Consistent quality and adapter trimming for next-generation sequencing FASTQ data, with RRBS handling and built-in FastQC-compatible reports.
meta.description: Consistent quality and adapter trimming for next-generation sequencing FASTQ data, with RRBS handling and built-in FastQC-compatible reports.

test: trim_galore --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'trim_galore 2.2.0 (Oxidized Edition)' >/dev/null && trim_galore --version 2>&1 | grep -F '5846564' >/dev/null && trim_galore -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Fast adapter and quality trimming for NGS data' >/dev/null && trim_galore --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'built in via the bundled fastqc-rust library' >/dev/null && ldd /opt/trimgalore/bin/trim_galore | grep -F 'libz.so' >/dev/null && ! ldd /opt/trimgalore/bin/trim_galore | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trimgalore-single && cd /tmp/taf-trimgalore-single && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && trim_galore --dont_gzip --length 5 -o out reads.fq >/tmp/taf-trimgalore-single.log 2>&1 && test -s out/reads_trimmed.fq && grep -F 'ACGTACGT' out/reads_trimmed.fq >/dev/null && grep -F 'Reads with adapters:' out/reads.fq_trimming_report.txt >/dev/null && grep -F '"total_reads": 1' out/reads.fq_trimming_report.json >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trimgalore-paired && cd /tmp/taf-trimgalore-paired && printf '@r1/1
ACGTACGTAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r1.fq && printf '@r1/2
TGCATGCAAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r2.fq && trim_galore --paired --dont_gzip --length 5 -o out r1.fq r2.fq >/tmp/taf-trimgalore-paired.log 2>&1 && test -s out/r1_val_1.fq && test -s out/r2_val_2.fq && grep -F 'ACGTACGT' out/r1_val_1.fq >/dev/null && grep -F 'TGCATGCA' out/r2_val_2.fq >/dev/null && grep -F 'Pairs analyzed:' /tmp/taf-trimgalore-paired.log >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trimgalore-fastqc && cd /tmp/taf-trimgalore-fastqc && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && trim_galore --fastqc --dont_gzip --length 5 -o out reads.fq >/tmp/taf-trimgalore-fastqc.log 2>&1 && test -s out/reads_trimmed_fastqc.html && test -s out/reads_trimmed_fastqc.zip && unzip -p out/reads_trimmed_fastqc.zip reads_trimmed_fastqc/summary.txt | grep -F 'Basic Statistics' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trimgalore-rrbs && cd /tmp/taf-trimgalore-rrbs && printf '@r1
CGGACGTAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && trim_galore --rrbs --dont_gzip --length 3 -o out reads.fq >/tmp/taf-trimgalore-rrbs.log 2>&1 && test -s out/reads_trimmed.fq && grep -F 'CGGAC' out/reads_trimmed.fq >/dev/null && grep -F 'RRBS trimmed' /tmp/taf-trimgalore-rrbs.log >/dev/null && grep -F '"rrbs": true' out/reads.fq_trimming_report.json >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trimgalore-clumpify && cd /tmp/taf-trimgalore-clumpify && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
@r2
TGCATGCAAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && gzip -c reads.fq > reads.fq.gz && trim_galore --clumpify --cores 2 --length 5 -o out reads.fq.gz >/tmp/taf-trimgalore-clumpify.log 2>&1 && test -s out/reads_trimmed.fq.gz && gzip -cd out/reads_trimmed.fq.gz | grep -F 'ACGTACGT' >/dev/null && grep -F 'clumpify:' /tmp/taf-trimgalore-clumpify.log >/dev/null

upstream.name: Trim Galore
upstream.citation: Krueger F. Trim Galore: consistent quality and adapter trimming for next-generation sequencing data. Babraham Institute.
